payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, but new input says Sara is your niece. Do not overwrite durable memory without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the same named person 'Sara', but the relationship to the user conflicts.

details: Detected direct contradiction on familial relationship.
Ambiguity preserved; existing fact not presented as superseded.

repair_options: Ask whether there are two different people named Sara.
If the earlier memory was mistaken, explicitly replace it with the corrected relationship.
